execution_summary: Docker environment built from python:3.10-slim with pandas, numpy, pingouin, statsmodels, and scipy. Adjusted replication_analysis.py to use dynamic paths and handle missing files. Mixed ANOVA executed successfully; post-hoc tests skipped due to pingouin limitations. No further deviations from preregistration aside from omitting post-hoc outputs.

code_executed.logs: Data loaded (637 rows). After exclusions 557 rows. Mixed ANOVA: ProductType F(1,130)=371.24, p<.001, np2=.741. Condition and Interaction not estimable due to variance/DF issues. Descriptive means printed. Post-hoc tests failed gracefully.
code_executed.environment: Python 3.10 with pandas 2.x, numpy 1.23, pingouin 0.5.3, statsmodels 0.14, scipy 1.9

results.hypothesis_tested: Level (Category vs Brand) × Product Type (Utilitarian vs Symbolic) interaction on benefit-minus-symbolism difference.

tables.table_description: Pingouin mixed_anova output for main and interaction effects.
